description.p: JAM-NG (JoinMarket NG) is a self-contained Bitcoin privacy application that makes CoinJoin transactions accessible to everyone. CoinJoin combines multiple users' funds into a single transaction, making it difficult to trace individual coins on the blockchain.

This application bundles everything needed for private Bitcoin transactions: the JAM web interface, a JoinMarket NG wallet daemon, a Bitcoin light client (neutrino), and a Tor daemon for network privacy. Just install, fund your wallet, and start using CoinJoin.

ul.li: Web-based JAM interface for easy wallet management
Built-in Bitcoin light client (no full node required)
Bundled Tor daemon for network-level privacy
Maker and Taker roles for earning or spending CoinJoin fees
Orderbook watcher to monitor the CoinJoin market
Configurable: use external Bitcoin Core or neutrino nodes

description.p: Flatpak polish release: refreshed bundled components and updated branding to JoinMarket NG.
